ab: Pitu, yangan mu maras inpit, musa su pakasiyuk kuzing aw?
ch: W:Pitu，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Pitu, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: ungat kung uziy, hani ga mara ni Payan.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Payan’s.

ab: nanu kasyukay ta tikay han aw? yanga misu bi’an.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: aw, agan.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: mahuway su, mahuway su kusa Payan uziy ki.
en: Thank you and thank Payan for me.

ab: nanu ku sawun su?
en: May I help you?

ab: muwah kung pabaziy sazing biru haniy.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: aw ki, nanu lawziy ku galun su?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: pakasiyuk kung lawziy tugan biru .
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: asa la. lungi su tugan riyax laga wahiy may la ki.
ch: W:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ini su bi’iy kung ku i’ing mu na.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: wayan misu bi’an saku sahaysa la
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: nanu huwa ka ini luy ku i’ing mu la.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: ini su wayan pakasyuki ni Yayut pi.
en: Did you lend it to Yayut?

ab: ini mu ba’iy, halay mu ma’ut hiya.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: namaw misu kasiyuk ku i’ing mu han.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Siwat, kinsyukan su ki Baysu ku latan haniy?
en: Siwat, did Siwat lend you this coat?

ab: ayat, hani ga banaziy kung ni yaya mu ki.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: matana ki isu ku latan uba ni Watan.
en: Watan’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: uba niya ga makalux iruw hiya, ini patana ki sami ku iruw niya.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Simuy, kinsiyuk su pila ni Tahus aw?
en: Simuy, did you borrow money from Tahus?

ab: hu, naki sawni ku awsa mu may hiya, yangan mu maras su pila la.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: nanu u kanuwaw ku usa su pabazih hiya ?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: halan mu may sasan la.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: aw, ragay misa kamayan Tahus.
en: Okay, I will tell Okay, I will tell  for you. for you.
